(Translated by Google)
Excellent location. A historic inn in the northern part of the city.

reviews.comment:
La carga de combustible siempre es lenta, aún cuando hay muchos surtidores. Si sos socio del ACA y querés el descuento hace la fila, si no, carga en otro lado. El resto de los servicios de la sede central están razonablemente bien atendidos, aunque con gran afluencia de público según días y horarios. Si querés lavar el auto, por ejemplo, anda a la mañana temprano, porque los turnos del día se llenan pronto.

(Translated by Google)
Fueling up is always slow, even though there are plenty of pumps. If you're an ACA member and want the discount, get in line; otherwise, fill up somewhere else. The other services at the main branch are reasonably well-staffed, although they can get very busy depending on the day and time. If you want to wash your car, for example, go early in the morning, because the daytime slots fill up quickly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJM09Mek13EAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay una larga fila para cargar porque los playeros son sumamente lentos para atender. Se quedan esperando a que se llene el tanque de un auto, luego le cobran, y recién después comienzan a llenar el tanque del auto que estaba esperando al otro lado del surtidor, el cual podrían haber llenado simultáneamente.

(Translated by Google)
There's always a long line to fill up because the attendants are incredibly slow. They wait for one car's tank to fill up, then they charge that car, and only then do they start filling the tank of the car waiting on the other side of the pump, which they could have filled simultaneously.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJaE43NzJnRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Very good gas station. Very good service. Well located. Sometimes quite busy.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para cargar nafta, tomar un cafe, visitar el museo, lo único falta buena limpieza en los baños que no es por culpa del ACA sino de los linternas, trapitos, etc que polulan por el parque.

(Translated by Google)
Good place to fill up with gas, have a coffee, visit the museum, the only thing missing is good cleaning in the bathrooms which is not the fault of the ACA but of the lanterns, rags, etc that swarm around the park.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJOTdhWnFRRRAB
